Functions.Name: PercentOfTotal
Functions.Description: Returns Amount as a percentage of its total when Filter is removed, rounded to DecimalPlaces.
MultiLineBody: DIVIDE ( Amount, CALCULATE ( Amount, REMOVEFILTERS ( Filter ) ) ) * 100,

Functions.Name: SafeDivide
Functions.Description: Divides Numerator by Denominator, returning AlternateResult when Denominator is blank or zero.
Functions.Body: IF ( ISBLANK ( Denominator ) || Denominator = 0, AlternateResult, Numerator / Denominator )
